arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Direct Connect connection.

aws_device.description: The AWS device associated with the Direct Connect connection.

bandwidth.description: The bandwidth of the Direct Connect connection.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Direct Connect connection.

location.description: The physical location where the Direct Connect connection is established.

owner_account_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the Direct Connect connection.

partner_name.description: The name of the partner providing the Direct Connect service.

provider_name.description: The name of the provider of the Direct Connect connection.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the Direct Connect connection.

vlan_id.description: The VLAN ID associated with the Direct Connect connection.
